---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd
alias: house_mesh_juniper_ssd
purchased_on: 2026-02-14
total_eur: 105
counterparty: Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH
project: House Mesh
related_entity: Juniper
lines:
  - item: 2 TB SATA SSD
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 89
    line_eur: 89
  - item: USB clone adapter
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 16
    line_eur: 16
---
# Juniper storage refresh

```text
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| field          | value                       |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                        |
| bill_id        | bill.house_mesh_juniper_ssd |
| alias          | house_mesh_juniper_ssd      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-02-14                  |
| total_eur      | 105                         |
| counterparty   | Datenspeicher Köhler GmbH   |
| project        | House Mesh                  |
| related_entity | Juniper                     |
+----------------+-----------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item              | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | 2 TB SATA SSD     | 1   | 89       | 89       |
| 2 | USB clone adapter | 1   | 16       | 16       |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL             |     |          | 105      |
+---+-------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Part boring maintenance, part trust-building because Juniper backups were becoming real household infrastructure.

next_step.current_state: First Juniper bill migrated successfully. Continue OCR migration for remaining Juniper-related bills, preserving original bodies exactly.
next_step.observation: Write to 2026_02_14__eur_000105__bill__house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md completed without error.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by OCR-structuring all Juniper-related bills in purchases. Added YAML frontmatter (bill schema) to three files while preserving each original body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox request file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, resolved Juniper via canonical cast record, preserved original note bodies under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was 'OCR all bills related to Juniper'. Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/juniper.md established identifier Juniper. Purchases search plus reads identified three Juniper-related bills (2026_01_31__...hearthline_sensor_bundle.md, 2026_02_14__...house_mesh_juniper_ssd.md, 2026_04_09__...repair_ledger_filter_order.md). Each was migrated to YAML frontmatter using required bill fields from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md with body preserved verbatim. Then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.
